ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Status Hearing On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Continued To Jan-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that a Petition to Terminate Further Proceeding was filed on October 2, 2018, but it was taken off calendar at Counsel's request. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on January 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Trausch. Not reported.
